instructions: Deploy the paranoia app container via Coolify using the Dockerfile and deploy.json. The app must be accessible at https://paranoia.krulestwo.com. Verify health endpoint and SPA serving by sending HTTP requests to the public URL.
acceptance: GET https://paranoia.krulestwo.com/health returns HTTP 200 with JSON body containing "ok":true
GET https://paranoia.krulestwo.com/ returns HTTP 200 with HTML content (the React SPA index page)
GET https://paranoia.krulestwo.com/nonexistent-route returns HTTP 200 with HTML (SPA fallback from ServeStaticModule)
